taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Backend Software Engineering, Platform, Web Services Development, Coding Agents, Automation Tools
skill_match_scores: Backend Software Engineering:1.0, Platform:0.0, Web Services Development:0.5, Coding Agents:0.5, Automation Tools:0.0
must_have_quals: 4-6 years of experience in backend software engineering, with experience building platform or web services, Experience with coding agents and automation tools, Proficiency in one of Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, with willingness to learn other languages, Experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector databases (vector DBs), AI agents, and Model Context Protocol (MCP), Good collaboration and communication skills, Exposure to Kubernetes and infrastructure as code, Demonstrated ability to embrace AI and apply it to your role as well as use data-driven insights to drive innovation, productivity, and continuous improvement
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain features for Guidewire's application platform, primarily focusing on backend services but with flexibility to occasionally work with infrastructure and frontend, Apply agentic coding tools as Guidewire uses them to dramatically accelerate development, Write clean, well-tested code with attention to quality, scalability, availability, and security, Collaborate with team members to deliver secure, scalable, and efficient platform operations, supporting Guidewire's mission of operational excellence and transformative innovation, Participate in code reviews and contribute to team best practices
job_summary: Guidewire Software is a leading platform for P&C insurers, and they are seeking a Software Engineer III to join their team in building a next-generation AI platform. The role involves developing and maintaining features for the application platform, focusing on backend services while ensuring quality, scalability, and security.
